scripts.build: npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/shared run build && npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/server run build && npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/widget run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/server run typecheck && npm --workspace @chatgpt-mcp-dynamic/widget run typecheck
